𝑺𝒐 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒑𝒓𝒆𝒚 𝒉𝒂𝒔 𝒕𝒆𝒆𝒕𝒉.

(Angst, Dead Dove, Betrayal, CCG!User, Possible Combat, Mentions of Smut, Tokyo Ghoul Bot Series, AnyPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

Just for context, you’re a CCG investigator and got called to investigate the Binge Eater, with the location you were given being the alley. Aside from that, everything is your choice.

TYPE SOUL ON THE 31ST LETS GOOOOO although I can’t say I’m excited about the new pd system

I lowkey need some anime recommendations. I finished Tokyo ghoul, I’m finishing bleach, and I’m watching DanDaDan with a friend. Don’t know what else I could watch.

This will most likely be worked on later, I made the personality when I first started Tokyo Ghoul so I didn’t know much.

Next bot is Furuta, and I’m actually excited to make it since I really like his character. Plus I don’t do many male bots so this is a nice change of pace.
creator: LetsonAI
